Keywords: AI salary, ML salary, data scientist salary, machine learning engineer, CAGR 30-40%, TensorFlow, PyTorch, job market growth
4. Industry-Specific AI Trends, Certifications & Target Companies
Chunk ID: msajce_aiml_chunk_04 | URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/aiml.php#tab3 | ~440 tokens
Context: Industry-specific AI trends, certifications to upskill, and target companies for AIML job applications.
Industry-Specific AI and ML Job Trends
(cid:127) Healthcare: Medical diagnostics, Personalized treatment, Drug discovery, Robot-assisted surgery, Bioinformatics, healthcare
data analytics.
(cid:127) Finance and Banking: Fraud detection, Credit scoring, Personalized banking, Automated trading. Fintech opportunities in
Blockchain, smart contracts, AI in Cryptocurrency.
(cid:127) Automotive (Autonomous Vehicles): Self-driving cars, Smart transportation. Skills needed: computer vision, sensor fusion,
real-time decision-making.
(cid:127) Retail and E-commerce: Personalized recommendations, dynamic pricing. Demand for recommendation algorithms and supply
chain optimization.
Certifications and Skills to Upskill
No. Certification / Skill
1 Python and R language for data manipulation and model development
2 TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Keras for deep learning
3 Pandas, NumPy, SciPy  data wrangling and analysis
4 SpaCy, Hugging Face  NLP frameworks for text processing and sentiment analysis
5 Google AI Certification & Deep Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng (Coursera)
6 Google Professional Machine Learning Engineer
7 AWS Certified Machine Learning  Specialty
8 Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate
9 IBM AI Engineering Professional Certificate
10 Data Science Professional Certificate
11 Certified Data Scientist (CDS)
12 Deep Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng
13 Advanced Machine Learning Specialization
14 Natural Language Processing with Deep Learning
Targeted Job Applications
AI-centric companies: Google, Microsoft, Amazon, NVIDIA, IBM, TCS, Infosys. Startups: India's growing AI/ML startups in
Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune. Freelancing: Upwork and Freelancer for AI/ML freelance opportunities.
(cid:127) What certifications should I get for AI and ML?
(cid:127) Is AWS ML certification useful after AIML degree?
(cid:127) Does AIML have scope in healthcare?
Keywords: AI certification, AWS ML, Azure AI Engineer, Google ML Engineer, IBM AI, TensorFlow, Keras, Andrew Ng, Coursera, healthcare AI,
fintech AI
